The '''Dark Jedi Enclave''' was located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. It was the home to two [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Sentinels]].

[[File:Dark_Jedi_Enclave2.jpg|thumb|left|Inside The Dark Jedi Enclave.]]

Inside the Enclave, there were numerous statues of cloaked Dark Jedi wielding swords, along with symbols and engravings etched into the walls in many places. In one portion of the Enclave there was also a triangular throne with food laid down onto a table in front of it.

Behind the throne, there was also a room similar to the Jedi Council's meeting chamber, with several chairs evenly spaced in a circle around the room.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Dark_Jedi_Enclave_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
The Dark Jedi Enclave was a location in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SotF" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Dark Jedi Enclave was added to the game with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 9 Notes for 29 June 04|Publish 9]]," on [[June 29]], [[2004]].<ref>{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?page=Recent%20Updates|text=Publish 9 Secrets of the Force}}</ref> The building was part of the pre-[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|NGE]] "[[W:c:swg:Jedi (pre-NGE)|Force Ranking System]]."<ref name="SWG:SotF" />
